_note: Per-lesson role-play scenario. Grounded in Pre-A1/taipei/park dialogue + vocab. Learner plays Tom; computer plays Anna. Each NPC node offers 2-3 branches so the same lesson language can be reached different ways. Consumed by RP.Engine + RP.classifiers.local (see roleplay/).
title: Taipei · The Big Green Park

npc.text: Look, Tom. The park is big and green.

routes.meaning: Tom says he can see many trees.
examples: Yes. I can see many trees.
routes.hint: 💬 Try saying: “Yes. I can see many trees.”

routes.meaning: Tom agrees the park is big and green.
routes.hint: 💬 You can say “Yes, so green!” or “Yes. I can see many trees.”

partial.message: Tell Anna what you see: “Yes. I can see many trees.”

off_topic.message: The park is big and green! Say “Yes. I can see many trees.”

npc.text: Yes, so green! Look at all the trees.

routes.meaning: Tom says he can see many trees.
examples: Yes. I can see many trees.
routes.hint: 💬 Try saying: “Yes. I can see many trees.”

partial.message: Say what you see: “Yes. I can see many trees.”

off_topic.message: Look at the trees! Say “Yes. I can see many trees.”

npc.text: We can sit under the tree.

routes.meaning: Tom is a little tired and wants to rest.
examples: I am a little tired. Let us rest.
I am tired. Let us rest.
routes.hint: 💬 Try saying: “I am a little tired. Let us rest.”

routes.meaning: Tom agrees to sit under the tree.
routes.hint: 💬 You can say “Okay, let's sit.” or “I am a little tired. Let us rest.”

partial.message: Tell Anna how you feel: “I am a little tired. Let us rest.”

off_topic.message: You can sit under the tree. Say “I am a little tired. Let us rest.”

npc.text: Look! I can see a dog. It can run.

routes.meaning: Tom says the dog is happy and he likes it.
examples: The dog is happy. I like it.
routes.hint: 💬 Try saying: “The dog is happy. I like it.”

routes.meaning: Tom is excited that the dog can run.
routes.hint: 💬 You can say “Wow, the dog can run!” or “The dog is happy. I like it.”

partial.message: Tell Anna about the dog: “The dog is happy. I like it.”

off_topic.message: A dog can run! Say “The dog is happy. I like it.”

npc.text: This is a good day. I am happy.

learning_objective: Say you want to come again

routes.meaning: Tom is happy too and wants to come again.
examples: Me too. We can come again.
Me too! Let us come again.
routes.hint: 💬 Try saying: “Me too. We can come again.”

partial.message: Tell Anna you agree: “Me too. We can come again.”

off_topic.message: It is a good day! Say “Me too. We can come again.”

learning_objective: Say you want to go home

routes.meaning: Tom says let us go home and says bye-bye.
examples: Now let us go home. Bye-bye!
routes.hint: 💬 Try saying: “Now let us go home. Bye-bye!”

partial.message: Time to go home. Say “Now let us go home. Bye-bye!”

off_topic.message: Taipei is fun! Say “Now let us go home. Bye-bye!”

npc.text: Bye-bye! It was a happy day. See you again, Tom!
